ddls:
CREATE TABLE "organisation_units" (
  "organisation_unit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each organisation unit */,
  "organisation_unit_name" TEXT /* Name of the organisation unit */,
  "description" TEXT /* A brief description of the organisation unit */,
  "contact_person" TEXT /* Name of the contact person for the organisation unit */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email address of the contact person */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the contact person */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the organisation unit was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the organisation unit was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("organisation_unit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "periods" (
  "period_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each period */,
  "period_name" TEXT /* Name of the period (e.g., Jan to Mar 2018) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the period */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the period */,
  "description" TEXT /* A brief description of the period */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the period (e.g., active, closed) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the period was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the period was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("period_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "healthcare_facilities" (
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each facility */,
  "facility_name" TEXT /* Name of the facility */,
  "organisation_unit_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the organisation unit the facility belongs to */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the healthcare facility */,
  "contact_person" TEXT /* Name of the contact person for the facility */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email address of the contact person */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the contact person */,
  "facility_type" TEXT /* Type of the healthcare facility (e.g., hospital, clinic) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the facility was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the facility was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("facility_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_healthcare_facilities_organisation_unit_id FOREIGN KEY ("organisation_unit_id") REFERENCES organisation_units ("organisation_unit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "institutional_deliveries" (
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each record */,
  "organisation_unit_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the organisation unit */,
  "period_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the period */,
  "institutional_delivery_coverage" REAL /* Institutional delivery coverage */,
  "home_delivery_coverage" REAL /* Home delivery coverage */,
  "facility_delivery_coverage" REAL /* Facility delivery coverage */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_institutional_deliveries_period_id FOREIGN KEY ("period_id") REFERENCES periods ("period_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_institutional_deliveries_organisation_unit_id FOREIGN KEY ("organisation_unit_id") REFERENCES organisation_units ("organisation_unit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "maternal_mortality" (
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each record */,
  "organisation_unit_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the organisation unit */,
  "period_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the period */,
  "maternal_deaths" INTEGER /* Number of maternal deaths */,
  "maternal_mortality_ratio" REAL /* Maternal mortality ratio per 100,000 deliveries */,
  "maternal_mortality_rate_per_100000" REAL /* Maternal mortality rate per 100,000 live births */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maternal_mortality_period_id FOREIGN KEY ("period_id") REFERENCES periods ("period_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maternal_mortality_organisation_unit_id FOREIGN KEY ("organisation_unit_id") REFERENCES organisation_units ("organisation_unit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "neonatal_mortality" (
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each record */,
  "organisation_unit_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the organisation unit */,
  "period_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the period */,
  "neonatal_deaths" INTEGER /* Number of neonatal deaths */,
  "neonatal_mortality_rate" REAL /* Neonatal mortality rate per 1,000 live births */,
  "neonatal_mortality_rate_per_1000" REAL /* Neonatal mortality rate per 1,000 live births */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_neonatal_mortality_organisation_unit_id FOREIGN KEY ("organisation_unit_id") REFERENCES organisation_units ("organisation_unit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_neonatal_mortality_period_id FOREIGN KEY ("period_id") REFERENCES periods ("period_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stillbirths" (
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each record */,
  "organisation_unit_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the organisation unit */,
  "period_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the period */,
  "stillbirth_rate" REAL /* Stillbirth rate per 1,000 births */,
  "stillbirth_rate_per_1000" REAL /* Stillbirth rate per 1,000 births */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stillbirths_period_id FOREIGN KEY ("period_id") REFERENCES periods ("period_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stillbirths_organisation_unit_id FOREIGN KEY ("organisation_unit_id") REFERENCES organisation_units ("organisation_unit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, analyst) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the platform */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the platform was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the platform */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user's browser */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access event was recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "healthcare_facility_performance" (
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each record */,
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the healthcare facility */,
  "organisation_unit_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the organisation unit */,
  "period_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the period */,
  "performance_metric" TEXT /* Name of the performance metric (e.g., institutional delivery coverage) */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the performance metric */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the performance record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the performance record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_healthcare_facility_performance_period_id FOREIGN KEY ("period_id") REFERENCES periods ("period_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_healthcare_facility_performance_organisation_unit_id FOREIGN KEY ("organisation_unit_id") REFERENCES organisation_units ("organisation_unit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_healthcare_facility_performance_facility_id FOREIGN KEY ("facility_id") REFERENCES healthcare_facilities ("facility_id")
)
